'''Temba Port''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]]. It was not, however, the most populated city on that [[Moon/Legends|moon]], being less inhabited than [[Baal Commune]].

{{City-stub}}
